corrections.current: ὅπως γνωστὸν ἦν ὅτι δεῖ φθάνειν τὸν ἥλιον ἐπ' εὐχαριστίαν
corrections.correct: ὅπως γνωστὸν ἦν ὅτι δεῖ φθάνειν τὸν ἥλιον ἐπʼ εὐχαριστίαν
corrections.note: Printed elision apostrophe is the raised form ʼ, not closing quote/apostrophe '.
Accent misplaced in the transcript; page clearly reads ἐτρεκόμπουν.
Lemma in apparatus is singular accusative ανθρωπον, matching the body word.
Apparatus clearly reads σοι και C.
Printed lemma is κρισεις, split across lines as κρι- / σεις.
Transcript dropped the star after ℵ and miscopied the parenthetical correction note.
Marginal siglum is Bmg, not Bairg.

notes: Body includes right-margin verse numbers 26–29 and XVII line numbers in image, but transcript did not improperly absorb them. Main body text otherwise matches page. Apparatus has several small misreadings; line breaks/hyphenation generally acceptable.
